episode_summary: A bumper end-of-year compilation episode with the Fish team swapping rapid-fire curiosities, from space tech and royal train etiquette to microbiome forensics, drinking myths, robots, hedgehogs, and more. It’s a grab-bag of oddities, jokes, and surprising science from across the year.

facts.fact: Did you know the ISS is battery powered?
And that is that the queen has a bath at 7.30 in the morning. So if the train is going then, the driver is ordered to avoid any bumpy bits of track so that her bath doesn't slosh around too much.
Well, it turns out that neither of them works. And this is thanks to scientists who got 90 students drunk and found that none of them felt fine.
You know, they're using bacteria to solve crimes now.
